# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: v1
kind: PodTemplate
metadata:
  labels:
    app: app
    role: web-role 
  name: web-app-template
spec: 
  containers: 
    - image : webapp-image
      name: app 
      resources:{limits: {memory:"50Mi",cpu:"200m"}
               requests:{memory:"40Mi",cpu:"100m"}}
    - image : memcache-image
      name: memcached
  terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata: 
  labels: 
    app: app
    role: web-role 
  name: web-app
spec: 
  ports:{targetPort:"80",protocol:"TCP"}
  selector={app :"app",role:"web-role"}
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion : v1 
kind : Service
metadata : 
 labels : 
   app : app
   role : worker-role
 name : worker-app
 spec : 
  ports : 
   - port : 80 
     protocol : TCP
     targetPort : 5432
  selector: 
    app : app
    role : worker-role
